versions.title: QOL & Bug Fixes
bullets: Fixed a bug which caused the "Similar" filter to not apply properly to results
Upgrade to pro reminder will show at most once a day
Tracks that have been queued but not played now get filtered out of results for a small amount of time
Searched tracks are now counted as played tracks

versions.title: Pulse Launcher & Easy filters
bullets: Added Pulse DJ Launcher, which automatically opens Pulse DJ when a supported DJ platform is launched
The main window now starts minimized when Pulse DJ launches
Revamped the recommendation filters
Added Greece to the available country list
Updated the tip lightbulb view UI
Added the ability to resize the minimized always-on-top icon
Added a “Reset to Defaults” option to the Features tab on the Profile page
Added automatic crash report uploads to help us identify and resolve issues
Added an Education Center with animated tips for dragging tracks, Curveball, the Local Files filter, and more
Removed the legacy algorithm selection system

versions.title: QOL & Bug fixes
bullets: The Pulse Window now automatically opens on app launch
Fixed a bug that caused the PulseAI card not to be clickable for certain OS versions
Hot100 "unread" status is now updated properly

versions.title: Scroll Up for Hidden Gems
bullets: Scroll up on the recommendations screen to explore deeper, less obvious results
Local remixes are now filtered to better match the current track
MyStyle now generates results for new remixes, even if they have never been played before
Searched tracks can now generate MyStyle results
Improved song detection accuracy
Refreshed the Profile page UI

versions.title: Smarter Recommendations & Tips
bullets: Local remixes are now filtered to match current track better
Improved song recognition algorithm
Added rotating tips for experienced Pulse DJ users
Improved onboarding with clearer error messages
Redesigned the On Top window with a refreshed green header
Added visual feedback when copying a recommendation
Improved app stability

versions.title: Remix Revamp
bullets: Remixes now show available versions from the DJ’s own library
Fixed a permission edge case that could trigger unnecessary system access requests
Removed UI jitter on hovering recommendations
Returned Hot 100 to the sidebar

versions.title: Premium Tier Added
bullets: Added Premium tier to PulseDJ, unlocking premium features
Fixed the “Recent” algorithm bug which sometimes caused 0 results to be shown
Added proper support for musical key conversion between Camelot Wheel notation and music notes
Fixed clipping in the minimized view hover state
Improved error logging

versions.title: Smarter Recommendations When Detection Is Unclear
bullets: Fixed an issue that could prevent the Pulse DJ database from downloading correctly
Improved recommendations when Pulse DJ is unsure which song is playing by using the previously played tracks as context

versions.title: Safer Updates & Better DJ Software Support
bullets: Added disk space checks before database updates, with a warning icon if more space is needed
Improved recommendations with a new approximate matching method
VirtualDJ and Traktor now provide BPM and other track metadata for the currently playing track
Improved Traktor support so MyStyle results are matched more reliably
Fixed a local library bug that could prevent played tracks from updating correctly

versions.title: Classic Plus, Mixxx Support & DJ Library Fixes
bullets: Added Classic Plus — a new recommendation algorithm for DJs who prefer a more familiar flow
Added a search bar to the country selection window
[BETA] Added Mixxx support, available as an opt-in setting
Improved djay Pro support song detection to use latest available version properly
Fixed BPM and key to show more reliably
Improved database update handling when a new Pulse DJ database needs to be downloaded
Upgraded the patch system to support more reliable database updates
Added Support Pulse DJ payments integration

versions.title: Stability Fix
bullets: Fixed a crash that could happen when music recognition scanned corrupted audio files

versions.title: Better Library Discovery & Smarter Wild Picks
bullets: Select your music folders manually for better local track discovery
Revamped local song discovery to make setup smoother and more reliable
Smarter "by Style" recommendations using a deeper music model
Improved stability with a fix for possible random music recognition crashes
Fixed ghost tooltips that could stay visible after hovering

versions.title: Full Language Support
bullets: Full app translation — all texts now available in multiple languages
djay Pro now reads from its database for improved track detection
Visual indicator when a track can't be dragged to your DJ software
Additional small UI improvements

versions.title: Minimal Mode
bullets: New minimal mode — a compact, unobtrusive overlay for your performance
Improved multi-language song title parsing for better matching
Opacity setting added to settings menu
BPM & Key now included in MyStyle processing

versions.title: Onboarding Wizard v2
bullets: Redesigned step-by-step setup wizard for Serato, Rekordbox, Virtual DJ & Traktor
New "Flassy" recommendation algorithm added
Journey-aware A/B testing for smarter suggestions

versions.title: Drag Songs + Local DB
bullets: Drag recommended tracks directly into your DJ software
Local song database — MyStyle and song mapping now processed on your machine
Filter to show only songs available locally on your computer
